summary: SelectionSauvegarde.gd internal logic is correct BUT it is ORPHANED — Menu3DPC CONTINUER bypasses SelectionSauvegarde entirely, going directly to HubAntre without profile load.

findings.description: Menu3DPC._on_menu_button('CONTINUER') calls _glitch_transition('res://scenes/HubAntre.tscn') — no LOAD_PROFILE dispatch, no SelectionSauvegarde.tscn instantiation. Profile and run_state NOT restored on continue.
SelectionSauvegarde.tscn/.gd are correct: _auto_continue() dispatches LOAD_PROFILE to MerlinStore then navigates to HubAntre — but this scene is never called from Menu3DPC.
MerlinStore IS available (GameManager autoload creates it). So SelectionSauvegarde.gd would work correctly if it were called. The fix is to route CONTINUER through SelectionSauvegarde.

invariants_broken: run_state never restored when player clicks CONTINUER from main menu
SelectionSauvegarde.tscn is a dead scene — 4 scene change calls all orphaned
recommendation: Fix Menu3DPC CONTINUER to route through SelectionSauvegarde.tscn (which handles profile load correctly) rather than directly to HubAntre.
